mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company(unified_social_credit_code, name, region_id, legal_person, contact_phone, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{unifiedSocialCreditCode}, #{name}, #{regionId}, #{legalPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM company ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM company WHERE region_id = #{regionId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM company WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM company WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR unified_social_credit_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR unified_social_credit_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
